# External ARM64 macOS Rust CLI expansion fixtures.
#
# Format:
# name|url|sha256|binary path inside archive or "." for direct binary|argv
#
# These are intentionally separate from the canonical manifest until each row is
# classified. The goal is to stress Rust runtime, helper-thread, terminal, and
# process-introspection behavior around the current delta failure class.
xh|https://github.com/ducaale/xh/releases/download/v0.26.1/xh-v0.26.1-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|c66e2f66cf0d486066f8bc6bb5e0b567fa62519b3cb9f68b4a2cfef8bce92892|xh-v0.26.1-aarch64-apple-darwin/xh|--version
uv|https://github.com/astral-sh/uv/releases/download/0.11.24/uv-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|7578c6087c5cd76981732b1f5d126248101faebdf81016ba780a65ce03653cdf|uv-aarch64-apple-darwin/uv|--version
mise|https://github.com/jdx/mise/releases/download/v2026.6.13/mise-v2026.6.13-macos-arm64.tar.gz|36478f14679e37ff38dfd3f238db6355dd5a90e1b3798b8a631d4574f46a280f|mise/bin/mise|--version
yazi|https://github.com/sxyazi/yazi/releases/download/v26.5.6/yazi-aarch64-apple-darwin.zip|7abd71725e2fe27bed036becbf6ce79fa17964eb68491d34190011c94b8c7ca8|yazi-aarch64-apple-darwin/yazi|--version
tealdeer|https://github.com/tealdeer-rs/tealdeer/releases/download/v1.8.1/tealdeer-macos-aarch64|4b3ecca53bdc41bc897c35f6457a6d2bb25aedc00816fdb3c28e947ef2900a34|.|--version
gping|https://github.com/orf/gping/releases/download/gping-v1.20.2/gping-macOS-arm64.tar.gz|4f63da3376abdc9e8bf4e8a562f57de911330fc416488eeaade39f8100018d2e|gping|--version
bandwhich|https://github.com/imsnif/bandwhich/releases/download/v0.23.1/bandwhich-v0.23.1-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|3b440e6a48c94c2ca7507d45f769d8e97fe9069bafa6f718b045a185addfad36|bandwhich|--version
difftastic|https://github.com/Wilfred/difftastic/releases/download/0.69.0/difft-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|c958b87885a5825a356c5899ac7ecdd752a7942084199f2be4bc0bf8c9de8e33|difft|--version
cargo-deny|https://github.com/EmbarkStudios/cargo-deny/releases/download/0.19.9/cargo-deny-0.19.9-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|be6fd555e910ac360e25cbef4f16ead47d87d2545fa07aa27223ef0f9af1a02c|cargo-deny-0.19.9-aarch64-apple-darwin/cargo-deny|--version
zellij|https://github.com/zellij-org/zellij/releases/download/v0.44.3/zellij-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|b6acf83a7739cf5f0f4e9bd47709642d4d98acbbf8c34d4a12c6e706f531da61|zellij|--version
jj|https://github.com/jj-vcs/jj/releases/download/v0.42.0/jj-v0.42.0-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz|98764966f22b599dc0b19bb9bd00d21df86156aeca5827f8274900356768db08|./jj|--version
